goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range and should be in the 'west'.
The restaurant should serve 'indian' food.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'address', and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be 'in the same area as the restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should be in the west
The restaurant should serve indian food
Make sure you get phone number, address, and postcode
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the same area as the restaurant
Make sure you get entrance fee
